title: calamus periacanthus
intro: Calamus periacanthus, also known as Acorus periacanthus, is a plant species belonging to the Acoraceae family, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calamus periacanthus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, Calamus periacanthus is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Indian medicine to make Ayurvedic formulations like capsules and tablets.
